step.name: load-current-config
step.action: Read lint + type-checker + test runner + perf budget configs.

step.name: run-category-detectors
step.action: Per category (lint, types, tests, perf, sec), compare against recommended baseline.

step.name: draft-remediation
step.action: Emit a diff per gap; estimate blast radius.
step.decision-gate: If blast radius > 100 files for any flag, defer with note.

step.name: publish
step.action: Assemble audit report JSON + Markdown summary; circulate to owner.
